ext_weather.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Sunny
ext_weather.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 80. Southwest wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
